title: Preact
excerpt: description: Deploy a Preact application to Cloudflare Pages. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [Preact ↗](https://preactjs.com) is a popular, open-source framework for building modern web applications. Preact can also be used as a lightweight alternative to React because the two share the same API and component model. In this guide, you will create a new Preact application and deploy it using Cloudflare Pages. You will use [create-preact ↗](https://github.com/preactjs/create-preact), a lightweight project scaffolding tool to set up a new Preact app in seconds.
